title: LightFixture
description: LightFixture: A light fixture is an electrical device that provides illumination.

OrientationAngle.description: Controls the local plan orientation of the object. Property has a quantity of type Angle measured in [rad].

LuminousFlux.description: The luminous flux is the measure of the perceived power of light.

ColourTemperature.description: The colour temperature is a means of describing the light fixture's appearance, measured in degrees Kelvin

ControlZone.description: A means of denoting light fixtures that should be controlled in a similar manner.

Power.description: The power of the light fixture described in kilowatts.

Parts.description: A means of adding an electrical connector part to the light fixture's properties. Gives the ability to add the voltage, amps, and denotes if the fixture should be on emergency power.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
